items.title: LiteLLM v1.88.0
items.summary: Verify Docker Image Signature All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign . Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53 . Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended): A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key: cosign verify \ --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \ ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.88.0 Verify using
